answers.answer: Keep 5min default. Add --no-cache flag (already implemented). No user-configurable TTL for now — keep it simple.
ALPN negotiation (already using http2_adaptive_window on reqwest). Silent fallback to HTTP/1.1. No http2_prior_knowledge.

Only nx.rs get_project_graph() calls nx CLI. Replace with direct project.json scanning: read nx.json for project patterns, glob for project.json files, parse root/targets. Handle plain npm workspaces (no project.json) via existing workspace.rs.
